title: PEAK Craft
description: Add the features and items from PEAK to your Minecraft world
body:
This mod adds the features and items from **PEAK** to your Minecraft world! 

By replacing the original health and hunger system, with a brand new stamina system, you will now be able to run and climb surfaces in your Minecraft world just like in PEAK. 

This mod is made for NeoForge 1.21.8 and will not be ported to older versions.

For the best experience it is recommended to play on the [Peak Craft Official Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/peak-craft-map)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qfBQCEmquuc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Disclaimer to Content Creators:**
If you make a video using this mod please leave credit in the description!

To climb on surfaces you must hold down right-click and forward on any flat surface. You can also press sneak while climbing to get a lunge boost, at the cost of a chunk of stamina.

You can give other climbing players behind you a helping hand, by holding right-click on a climbing player.

![player climbing on flat surface with stamina bar shown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a0eb883e53281800d0af1935d7693860e710f68.jpeg)

Your stamina will decrease in different ways, starting with hunger if you don’t eat, your bar will drop. Taking damage also reduces stamina, and each type of damage causes specific afflictions. Some of these wear off on their own, while others will need special items to heal.

**Items that can heal injury afflictions:**
- Golden Apple
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Instant Health Potion
- Potion of Regeneration
- Bandages (or cooked version)
- First Aid Kit (or cooked version)

If your afflications surpass your stamina bar, you will pass out and if not revived, you will die.

![player died and didnt get revived, dropping all of their items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92894d5eb045cf628bc67e897f353b176f265c2b.jpeg)

To pick up items, simply press crouch.

**Current List of items added:**
- Bing Bong
- Ancient Idol (Golden Bing Bong)
- Blowgun
- Piton
- Scout Effigy
- Explosive Bulb
- Dynamite
- Marshmallow (with cooked version)
- Bandages (with cooked version)
- First Aid Kit (with cooked version)
- Antidote (with cooked version)
- Big Lollipop (with cooked version)
- Ancient Statue Varients
  

PEAKCraft is not official nor is it endorsed by Aggro Crab or Landfall Games.
